critical_gap: The code labeled 'Step 8' implements only sub-component (b) of the paper's Step 8 Prototype-AI I. The paper requires a COMPLETE integrated AI prototype with six sub-components. What is implemented is one building block.
open_boundaries: Prototype-AI I requires ALL 6 sub-components working together — not just the world model
Recursive state-update (perception component) not implemented as part of Step 8
Feature finding with importance feedback from model not implemented
Feature ranking for inclusion in environment model not implemented
Model-learning / planning feedback cycling (sub-step e) not implemented
Proper search control (sub-step f) not implemented
No benchmark evidence showing world-model prediction accuracy on multi-state problems
note: IMPORTANT: The code's 'Step 8' is mislabeled relative to the paper. The paper's Step 8 is 'Prototype-AI I' — the first complete AI prototype integrating all prior steps. The code implements only the OneStepWorldModel building block. This is ~1/6 of the paper's Step 8 vision. The remaining 5 sub-components (recursive state update, feature finding with feedback, feature ranking, cycling feedback, search control) are not implemented.
